urlset:
{{ SITE_URL|default:"https://ehostelfinder.com" }}/ daily 1.0
{{ SITE_URL|default:"https://ehostelfinder.com" }}/universities/ daily 0.9
{{ SITE_URL|default:"https://ehostelfinder.com" }}/how-it-works/ monthly 0.7
{{ SITE_URL|default:"https://ehostelfinder.com" }}/contact/ monthly 0.6
{{ SITE_URL|default:"https://ehostelfinder.com" }}/privacy-policy/ yearly 0.4
{{ SITE_URL|default:"https://ehostelfinder.com" }}/terms-of-use/ yearly 0.4
{{ SITE_URL|default:"https://ehostelfinder.com" }}/cookie-policy/ yearly 0.3
{% for hostel in hostels %}
{{ SITE_URL|default:"https://ehostelfinder.com" }}/hostel/{{ hostel.id }}/ weekly 0.8
{% endfor %}
